metadata.title: He Had Everything. Midlife Broke Him Anyway | Blake Mycoskie

core_arcs.arc_summary: Midlife as a period of profound change, resilience, and authentic growth.
language_used: impact, a different form of ROI
core_arcs.why_it_matters_for_voice: Highlights Blake's lived experience of overcoming setbacks through resilience and purpose.

core_arcs.arc_summary: Prioritizing relationships and community as essential for fulfillment.
turning_points: Realizing connection is more vital than success
core_arcs.why_it_matters_for_voice: Reveals Blake's authentic emphasis on human connection shaping his voice.

inner_life_patterns.description: Consistent emphasis on relationships as life's foundation.
Viewing midlife and challenges as opportunities for growth.
evidence_quotes: midlife isn't a crisis, but a chrysalis

inner_life_patterns.description: Acknowledging pain and mental health as part of growth.

top_beliefs: Relationships are central to a meaningful life
Midlife is a period of growth, not decline
tensions: Maintaining vulnerability in a performance-driven culture

recurring_metaphors.meaning: Midlife as a transformative cocoon leading to rebirth.
Deep relationships sustain and define purpose.

identity_shift_notes.who_he_was_before: A high-profile founder and CEO, defined by success.
identity_shift_notes.who_he_is_now: Values vulnerability, connection, and midlife growth.
identity_shift_notes.what_caused_the_shift: Experiencing mental health struggles and reflecting on life's deeper purpose.

era_read.notes: Blake's current narrative emphasizes resilience, connection, and transformation, aligning with Era C themes.

title: He Had Everything. Midlife Broke Him Anyway | Blake Mycoskie
